Title: Successful user registration
Preconditions: - System is running; no user with provided email exists.
Test Data:
- Email: `volunteer1@example.com`
- Password: `SecurePass123!`
- Name: `John`
- Surname: `Doe`
- Cell: `+393331234567`
- DoB: `1990-05-15`
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to registration page.
2. Enter all test data.
3. Submit registration form.
Expected Result:
- User account created in `Utente` table with `isActive=1`, `isVolontario=1`, `isCoordinatore=0`.
- No errors; confirmation message displayed.

Title: Failed registration with duplicate email
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to registration page.
2. Enter duplicate email and valid password.
3. Submit form.
Expected Result:
- Error message: "Email already registered."
- No new user created in database.

Title: Successful login with valid credentials
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to login page.
2. Enter credentials.
3. Submit login.
Expected Result:
- JWT token generated and stored in `Token` table with `revoked=false`.
- User redirected to home page; `isActive=1` in `Utente` table.

Title: Failed login with incorrect password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to login page.
2. Enter email and incorrect password.
3. Submit login.
Expected Result:
- Error message: "Invalid credentials."
- No token generated; user remains on login page.

Title: Create emergency as authenticated coordinator
Test Data:
- Name: `Flood in Milan`
- Description: `River overflow; evacuate zone A`
- Region: `Lombardia`
- Province: `Milano`
- Start Date: `2023-10-01`
- End Date: `2023-10-03`
Test Steps:
1. Click "Inserisci emergenza."
2. Enter all test data.
3. Submit form.
Expected Result:
- Emergency record created in `Emergenza` table with `isActive=1`.
- Message: "Emergenza creata con successo."

Title: Create emergency with incomplete data
Test Steps:
1. Click "Inserisci emergenza."
2. Enter only name; leave other fields blank.
3. Submit form.
Expected Result:
- Error message: "Compila tutti i campi obbligatori."
- No record created in `Emergenza` table.

Title: View emergencies as unauthenticated user
Expected Result: - Redirect to login page with message: "Autenticazione richiesta."

Title: View emergencies with no active emergencies
Preconditions: - User `volunteer1@example.com` is logged in; no active emergencies exist.

Title: Create task as authenticated user
Preconditions: - User `coordinator1@example.com` is logged in; emergency `idEmergenza=1` exists.
Test Data:
- Name: `Distribute food supplies`
- Description: `Deliver to shelter X`
- Requested Users: `volunteer1@example.com`
- Region: `Lombardia`
Test Steps:
1. Click "Crea nuovo compito."
2. Enter test data.
3. Submit form.
Expected Result:
- Task record created in `Compito` with `isActive=1`, `terminato=0`.
- Assignment record created in `Assegnazione` with `utentiRichiesti="volunteer1@example.com"`.

Title: Assign task to volunteer (auto-assignment)
Preconditions:
- Task `id=1` exists with `utentiRichiesti="volunteer1@example.com"`.
- User `volunteer1@example.com` is logged in.
Expected Result:
- Record created in `UtenteCompito` with `dataInizio=current_timestamp`, `isActive=1`.
- `Assegnazione` record updated with `accetta=1`, `terminata=0`.

Title: Terminate task as coordinator
Preconditions:
- Task `id=1` exists with `terminato=0`.
- User `coordinator1@example.com` is logged in.
Expected Result:
- `Compito` record updated with `terminato=1`, `isActive=0`.
- `Assegnazione` record updated with `terminata=1`.

Title: Remove volunteer from task (edge case: no volunteer assigned)
Preconditions:
- Task `id=1` exists but has no assigned volunteer (`UtenteCompito` empty).
- User `coordinator1@example.com` is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Click "Visualizza emergenza" → select task `id=1`.
2. Attempt to remove volunteer.
Expected Result: - Error message: "Nessun volontario assegnato a questo compito."

Title: Terminate emergency with assigned tasks
Preconditions:
- Emergency `idEmergenza=1` exists with 2 active tasks (`terminato=0`).
- User `coordinator1@example.com` is logged in.
Expected Result:
- `Emergenza` record updated with `isActive=0`, `dataFine=current_timestamp`.
- Message: "2 emergenze terminate" (or similar, based on actual count).

Title: Promote volunteer to coordinator
Preconditions:
- User `volunteer1@example.com` exists with `isVolontario=1`, `isCoordinatore=0`.
- User `admin@example.com` is logged in as admin.

Title: Demote coordinator to volunteer
Preconditions:
- User `coordinator1@example.com` exists with `isCoordinatore=1`.
- User `admin@example.com` is logged in as admin.
Expected Result:
- `Utente` record updated: `isCoordinatore=0`.
- Message: "Ruolo aggiornato." (No change to `isVolontario` if not explicitly set.)

Title: Invalid token for task creation
Preconditions: - No valid token exists for user.
Expected Result:
- HTTP 401 error response.
- Log entry in `Logger` with error details.

Title: Database failure during task creation
Test Steps: 1. User attempts to create a task.
Expected Result:
- HTTP 500 error response.
- Log entry in `Logger` with database error details.

Title: Terminate emergency with no tasks
Preconditions: - Emergency `idEmergenza=1` exists but has no tasks.
Expected Result:
- `Emergenza` record updated with `isActive=0`.
- Message: "Nessuna emergenza terminata" or "Emergenza terminata senza compiti."

Title: User updates personal info with invalid email format
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to profile settings.
2. Update email to `invalid-email`.
3. Submit changes.
Expected Result:
- Error message: "Formato email non valido."
- No changes saved to `Utente` table.
